# CompleteReport

**Instance Method**

Completes all async requests made when getting or setting a report.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual void CompleteReport(OSAction *action, IOReturn status, uint32_t actualByteCount);
```

## Parameters

- **action**: The action passed to the `getReport` or `setReport` methods.
- **status**: The completion status.
- **actualByteCount**: The size of the buffer sent to the `getReport` or `setReport` methods.

## Discussion

Call this method upon completion of the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDDevice/getReport] and [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDDevice/setReport] methods.

## Processing Device Reports

- **handleReport**: Handles an asynchronous report received from the HID device.
- **getReport**: Gets a report from the HID device.
- **setReport**: Sends a report to the HID device.
- **Report Options**: The enumerated report options.
